description: AllTrails is an outdoor discovery and navigation service for finding trails, parks, and route information, with apps and maps for hiking, running, and biking. It also offers integrations with consumer platforms and AI assistants for trail discovery.
summary: AllTrails exposes a public MCP server at `https://www.alltrails.com/mcp`; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surface was found on alltrails.com.
